# Synerthink

> Synerthink builds foundational computing products for autonomous systems. Our first product, Dotlanth, is a high-trust execution fabric focused on record-first observability, replayable runs, and capability-explicit security.

Synerthink exists to make execution legible. We design small cores with stable interfaces, explicit control, and artifacts you can audit.

## Key Pages

- [Home](/): Company overview.
- [About](/about): Thesis and operating principles.
- [Products](/products): Product index.
- [Dotlanth](/products/dotlanth): Product overview and roadmap.
- [Blog](/blog): Research and releases.
- [Dotlanth v26.1.0-alpha](/blog/dotlanth-v26-1-0-alpha): Release post.

- [Synerthink on GitHub](https://github.com/synerthink): Organization profile.
- [Dotlanth releases](https://github.com/ademclk/dotlanth/releases): Binaries and changelogs.
- [Synerthink on LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/company/synerthink): Company updates.
- [Synerthink on X](https://twitter.com/synerthink): Announcements.
